# Q 

2 

RIM EVO

## Exterior / coating

### Dedicated Wheel Coating

Q² Rim EVO is a ceramic coating made specifically for wheels. It guards all rim finishes against brake dust, road grime, and high temperatures. The EVO formula boosts durability and simplifies application while maintaining a neutral appearance without unwanted gloss.

![image](https://gyeon.co/wp-content/uploads/2024/01/productmain-1700x1645-evo-rim-box-1024x991.png)

[Technical Details](#technical-details)

## Ceramic rim coating

Q² Rim EVO reduces brake dust buildup and makes wheels easier to clean. It forms a heat-resistant protective layer that limits contamination bonding and slows surface wear. Regular washing becomes faster and requires less effort.

![image](https://gyeon.co/wp-content/uploads/2025/12/benefiticons12.svg)

EASY BRAKE-DUST REMOVAL 

![image](https://gyeon.co/wp-content/uploads/2025/12/benefiticons68.svg)

SELF-CLEANING PROPERTIES 

![image](https://gyeon.co/wp-content/uploads/2025/12/benefiticons23.svg)

GUARDS AGAINST THE ELEMENTS 

![image](https://gyeon.co/wp-content/uploads/2025/12/benefiticons81.svg)

WATER REPELLENT 

what makes

Q2 RIM EVO so special? 

![image](https://gyeon.co/wp-content/uploads/2024/01/ch2a2200-683x1024.jpg)

Endures high heat cycles and temperatures over 800°C without performance loss.

![image](https://gyeon.co/wp-content/uploads/2024/01/ch2a2186-683x1024.jpg)

Reduces brake dust buildup, decreasing the need for harsh cleaners.

## TECHNICAL DETAILS

![image](https://gyeon.co/wp-content/uploads/2025/12/860x640q2rim.webp)

CAPACITIES 

30 ML

BOX CONTAINS 

Q² RIM EVO / APPLICATOR SET / MANUAL 

Durability 

Beading 

Self-cleaning 

Real World Lifespan

up to 18 months/45k km

PH Tolerance

2-11

TEMPERATURE RESISTANCE

>800'C

Consumption

15-20ml / set

[Instruction](https://gyeon.co/wp-content/uploads/2025/02/2023exteriorcoatingsmanual.pdf)

## HOW TO USE

Q 

2 

RIM EVO

01
Clean the wheels thoroughly and remove old protection, brake dust and contamination. 

02
Ensure the surface is oil-free and completely dry. Use Q²M Prep. Wait 15 minutes. 

03
Apply a generous amount of product using the included Q²M Coating Applicator. Make sure the surface is cool and free of dust. 

04
Apply the coating evenly. Any movement pattern works, but leveling is essential. 

05
Wipe off immediately, within 10 to 30 seconds of applying. 

### Watch
product
video

## FREQUENTLY ASKED
QUESTIONS

01
Can Q² Rim EVO be used on all wheel finishes? 

Yes. It is safe on painted, powder coated, anodised and polished wheels.

02
Does it add gloss to the wheels? 

No. It keeps a neutral finish while adding depth to the colour.

03
How heat resistant is the coating? 

It resists temperatures above 800°C.

04
Can it be applied to brake calipers? 

Absolutely, as long as the surface is clear-coated.

05
How should coated wheels be washed? 

Use pH neutral shampoo and avoid strong acidic or alkaline cleaners.

[FIND MORE ANSWERS](https://gyeon.zendesk.com/hc/en-us/sections/360000252038-Q-Rim)

## Recommended Pairing

We recommend complementary products that perfectly match your current one, creating a complete and convenient KIT. Together, they deliver the best performance and a seamless user experience.
